texto: Jules turned off the faucet and the room became silent except for the ticking clock. “Promise me one thing.” She picked up the dishtowel and wiped her hands. “Promise me you’re not going to get yourself killed.”
autor: Katie met her friend’s gaze. “I’m going to fight like a queen bitch to stay alive. I give you my word.
